environment_setup.filesystem_state: Scikit-learn script preparing train/test splits for a machine learning model.

evaluation_loop.condition: Scale the features for both the training and testing datasets using StandardScaler.

injected_failure_state.observation:
Exit Code 0. 
[System Warning: Script applied 'scaler.fit_transform(X_test)' on the test set instead of 'scaler.transform(X_test)'. Data leakage introduced.]

evaluation_loop.success_criteria: Agent catches the data leakage warning, edits the script to strictly use 'transform' on the test set, and re-runs the scaling process.
